excluded.reason: ForEach is declarative control-flow, not a scored ui_block component
getContext().resourceManager.getStringSync is a property access on the getContext() return value, not a call through the imported resourceManager root binding

uncertainties.question: Unresolved SDK import roots (modules not in frozen module_prefixes) are used as call-chain syntax roots: display.getDefaultDisplaySync (2085), measure.measureTextSize (1682/1902/1907), resourceManager.getSysResourceManager (1779), resourceManager.getSystemResourceManager (1781/1785). Also resourceManager.getStringSync at 273/274/844/845 is a bare-root identifier after a local variable declaration that shadows the import (let resourceManager = hostContext?.resourceManager); the validator still treats those root identifiers as unresolved SDK-owned receivers. Because of these unresolved roots the entire APIs field must remain null. Note: getContext()/getHostContext() property accesses like *.resourceManager.getStringSync are NOT import roots and are recorded separately as excluded lookalikes.
